article_title: SEMI Projects Global Fab Equipment Spending Will Hit $133 Billion in 2026 as AI Rewrites the Scale of Chip Manufacturing

content_preview.title: SEMI Projects Global Fab Equipment Spending Will Hit $133 Billion in 2026 as AI Rewrites the Scale of Chip Manufacturing
content_preview.summary: The industry association's latest 300mm Fab Outlook report forecasts an 18 percent jump in equipment spending this year, with investments projected to exceed $150 billion for the first time in 2027 as AI demand drives historic commitments to advanced capacity across all major regions.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Equipment Spending Poised for Double-Digit Growth

Worldwide 300mm fab equipment spending is expected to increase 18 percent to $133 billion in 2026 and 14 percent to $151 billion in 2027, according to SEMI's latest [300mm Fab Outlook report published on April 1](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/semi-projects-double-digit-growth-in-global-300mm-fab-equipment-spending-for-2026-and-2027-302730416.html). The 2027 figure would mark the first time the industry has crossed the $150 billion ...

editor_notes.content_quality: Detailed semiconductor equipment spending forecast with regional breakdowns.
editor_notes.source_verification: PR Newswire (x2 SEMI reports) and Tom's Hardware — all on allowlist. All verified reachable.
